message:
refactor(distributed): simplify distribute() to sequential sends

Replace the bounded-concurrent SelectAllDrain pipeline with a
straightforward sequential loop over replica assignments. This
removes the Pin/Box allocation per send, the SendFuture type alias,
the in-flight Vec management, and the enqueue closure — simplifying
the code significantly with no change in correctness semantics.

The sequential approach is sufficient for the current workload
profile where replica count is small and send latency is bounded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
